name: Hamilton College
meets_full_need_notes: Hamilton meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Hamilton includes a loan/work expectation in many aid packages. No universal no-loan policy.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid as RD applicants. ED agreement can be reconsidered if aid package is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Hamilton accepts appeals when family finances change. Submit additional documents to Financial Aid Office.
